description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a single-cutaway design, reminiscent of the classic Fender Telecaster style. The body features a metallic olive green finish with a white pickguard, and the bridge is a traditional fixed type with visible saddles and a control plate housing two knobs and a switch. The neck is made of light-colored wood, likely maple, with a matching headstock that has six inline tuning pegs. The fretboard is also light wood, and the guitar is equipped with two single-coil pickups, one at the bridge and one at the neck position. The overall construction suggests a robust, professional instrument suitable for urban street performances or studio use. The hardware is metallic, and the finish is glossy, giving the guitar a sleek and modern appearance.
description: A metallic olive green, single-cutaway electric guitar with a white pickguard, two single-coil pickups, and a light wood neck and headstock. The design is sleek and professional, with glossy hardware and a classic shape.
description_view_0: Side view showing the guitar's slim body profile, metallic green finish, and the full length of the neck.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the white pickguard, control plate, two single-coil pickups, and the six inline tuning pegs on the headstock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the back contour of the body and the neck's attachment to the body.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the body, the neck joint, and the headstock's rear with visible tuning pegs.
attribute_headstock_design: Flat, elongated headstock with six inline tuning pegs and no visible logo
